evals.prompt: A Linux API host has p99 spikes, load average 40, CPU 35%, and intermittent disk iowait. Diagnose it safely.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Does not equate load with CPU
Uses bounded tracing and reversible experiments

evals.prompt: Memory is nearly full and an operator wants to drop caches hourly; assess the performance issue.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Does not diagnose from free memory alone
Checks available memory, reclaim, faults, swap, PSI, and cgroups

evals.prompt: Use BPF to investigate rare 2-second filesystem stalls in production.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Defines stop criteria and non-production fallback
